business.name: WRP Detailing Solutions
business.address: 5th street - Doha St - Al Nahda - Dubai

reviews.text:
I’ve trusted the owner with my car for many years, and he’s always gone above and beyond. With this new detailing shop, the level of quality and care is even more impressive.

The moment you walk in, the staff are incredibly helpful and attentive, and the whole place gives off a comfortable, welcoming “home” feeling.

The service is top-tier, the results speak for themselves, and the support he gives his customers is unmatched. My car has never looked better.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Mark, thank you so much for the 5-star review! We are thrilled to hear you had a great experience with us. Your support means the world to our team, and we can’t wait to see you again soon!
reviews.highlightQuote: The service is top-tier, the results speak for themselves

reviews.text:
One of the best in business as now . From the moment I arrived, the team demonstrated true professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine care for my vehicle. They explained every step of the process clearly and offered helpful suggestions without any pressure.

The quality of their work is exceptional—my car looks brand new, inside and out. The exterior shines beautifully, and the interior has been cleaned thoroughly. They managed to remove stains and marks I thought would never come out!

What truly sets this place apart is their dedication to customer satisfaction. They took their time, ensured everything was perfect, and delivered beyond my expectations. The pricing is fair considering the top-notch service and outstanding results.

I highly recommend this detailing shop to anyone who wants their car to receive premium care.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks a million, Sujith. Having someone who lives the track life and still takes care of the details is cool. We enjoyed the chance to give your car our best. Whenever you’re back in town, swing by our place, your spot’s here.
reviews.highlightQuote: They managed to remove stains and marks I thought would never come out

reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I don’t usually write long reviews, but WRP in Al Qusais truly deserves one! 🙌 From the moment I stepped in, the team made me feel completely welcome warm greetings, genuine smiles, and a clear sense of professionalism that instantly gives you confidence in their work. 😊

The entire experience was smooth from start to finish. Every staff member I interacted with knew exactly what they were doing and explained things clearly, which I really appreciated. 💬 They didn’t just rush through the process; they actually took time to make sure everything was perfect, and that level of attention to detail really stood out. 👏

What impressed me most was how organized and clean the place is. 🧼✨ Everything is well arranged, spotless, and gives off a premium feel. The whole atmosphere is relaxed yet professional. You can tell they take pride in maintaining high standards, both in service and presentation.

The staff’s attitude is top-notch. They’re friendly, respectful, and always ready to help with a positive vibe. 💪 Whether you’re asking a small question or need assistance with something complex, they handle it with patience and confidence. It’s rare to see that combination of efficiency and genuine care these days.

The service quality itself is outstanding! 🔥 Everything was handled efficiently and done right the first time. They double-checked everything before handing it over and made sure I was happy with the results. There was no unnecessary waiting or confusion, just straight-up professionalism from start to finish. ⏱️

Another thing I loved is that they actually listen! 👂 If you share feedback or a small request, they don’t just nod and forget; they act on it immediately. That level of customer care really sets WRP apart from others in the area. It shows that they truly value every customer who walks in. 💯

Location-wise, WRP in Al Qusais is easy to reach 🚗 and parking wasn’t an issue at all. The signage and overall look of the place make it easy to spot, and it’s clear that they’ve put effort into creating a pleasant environment both inside and out.

Overall, I’d rate this as a 10/10 experience — not just because of the excellent service, but because of how effortlessly everything came together. You don’t often find a place where professionalism, friendliness, and genuine customer care blend so naturally. 🌟

If you’re anywhere near Al Qusais, do yourself a favor and visit WRP. Whether it’s your first time or you’re a returning customer, they treat everyone with the same enthusiasm and respect. I’ll definitely be coming back and recommending them to friends and family! 🙏💥
reviews.ownerResponse: Hey Venkat, thanks a ton for this review! 🫂 We’re thrilled you enjoyed not just the detailing, but the whole atmosphere here, the friendly greetings, the lounge, the snooker table, the TV zone… we like to think of this space as more than a workshop, it's a spot to hang out and feel welcome. It was great having you, and we hope your car’s still looking sharp. Next time you’re over, we’ll have the coffee ready and the playlist cued — see you soon! 🎱📺🚗
reviews.highlightQuote: They treat everyone with the same enthusiasm and respect

reviews.text: Great quality of work , I didn't expect this much results as my car was little old . but car looked like a brand new car after the detailing service . My interior looked just like when I bought the car new . They have picked up the car from my location and delivered with very much care and timely updates .thank you for the best service .
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Vinod, Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, we really  appreciate it and we look forward to serving you again."
reviews.highlightQuote: car looked like a brand new car after the detailing service

reviews.text:
I got my car detailed at WRP, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. The work was done promptly, yet the results were absolutely excellent! My car looked like it had just rolled out of the showroom and even better, the pricing was very affordable, especially considering the quality of the service.

Highly recommended!

reviews.text: Gave my FJ Cruiser to WRP for Adam’s ceramic coating and the experience was excellent. I use the car for desert off-roading, and it now looks like brand-new showroom condition. The team kept me updated throughout the process with pictures and videos, and the workmanship is truly amazing. Car was delivered exactly on the promised time. Highly recommended!
reviews.ownerResponse: Leno, thank you for sharing this feedback! Happy to hear you found the updates useful and love the result, your FJ Cruiser looks amazing. We’re always aiming to deliver on time and with top craft, so your review means a lot. See you next time!
reviews.highlightQuote: it now looks like brand-new showroom condition

reviews.text: Great service And Good staff  i took car detaling they have accommodating good staff Also love the waiting Area I Highly Recommend Wrp Detaling
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Shafan for the review. Looking forward to serve you again.

reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience with WRP Detailing Solutions for re-installing the PPF on my car, and the work was done absolutely perfectly. They matched the PPF exactly with the same quality and finish as the existing film on the car, and the result is seamless — it blends in like factory installation with excellent attention to detail.

In addition, I also got custom floor mats made for my Jetour T2, and the quality, fitting, and finishing were spot on — very accurate and premium feel.

What made the experience even better is how comfortable and enjoyable it was while they worked on the car — they even have a billiards area on the first floor, so you can relax and play while your car is being taken care of!

I didn’t try their premium detailed car wash this time, but I noticed that the price is the same as other washes outside, while the level of attention to detail is excellent and on a completely different level — I will definitely be trying it on my next visit.

A special thanks to Mr. Shahul for his excellent coordination and support throughout. Honestly, the entire team is amazing — extremely professional, skilled, polite, and a pleasure to deal with.

Highly recommended and I strongly suggest experiencing their service once, and you will definitely keep visiting them!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you Mr.Dhanesh, we are incredibly happy to see your 5-star review ! On behalf of the whole team here at WRP, we want to thank you for taking the time to share your experience.
​Reviews like yours truly make our day. We put a lot of heart into our services, and knowing that it hit the mark for you is the best reward we could ask for. It’s customers like you who make what we do so fulfilling.
​We are so grateful for your support and can’t wait to welcome you back again soon. If there is ever anything we can do to make your next experience even better, please don't hesitate to reach out!

reviews.text: I got my car washed and polished today, and I’m extremely happy with the results. The team did a fantastic job! I recommend everyone to visit this shop and see their quality work for yourself.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Sabith for your review and your recommendation to choose WRP . We really appreciate it. Hope to see you soon.

reviews.text:
I was genuinely blown away by the entire experience. From the moment  I stepped through the door, the ambiance was immediately inviting—it felt less like a standard garage and more like a high-end lounge.
The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, instantly making me feel comfortable and valued. This high level of personal service extends directly to their work, demonstrating pure professionalism and a meticulous eye for detail throughout the process. It's clear that they take immense pride in what they do.
What truly sets them apart is the quality of their product. My car looked, felt, and smelled exceptional. The cleaning and protective agents they use are clearly top-tier, resulting in a finish that surpassed my highest expectations.
And the best part? The opportunity to play billiards while my car was being perfected! This unique perk is truly the feather in their cap, turning what is usually a boring wait into a genuinely enjoyable use of time.
If you are looking for exceptional service, professionalism, and outstanding results, look no further WRP Detailer is simply the best in the business. Highly, highly recommended!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Manohar!
Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a detailed and wonderful review. We’re thrilled to know that you enjoyed not only the quality of our detailing but also the comfort and atmosphere we work hard to provide.

Our team truly appreciates your kind words about their professionalism and attention to detail, it means a lot. And we’re glad you loved the billiards lounge experience while your car was being pampered!

We take great pride in delivering the best care and premium results for every vehicle, and hearing that we exceeded your expectations motivates us even more.

Looking forward to welcoming you again soon. Thanks for choosing WRP Detailer and for the high recommendation! 🚘✨

reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Excellent Service!

Got my car detailed here and honestly, I’m super impressed. The staff knew exactly what they were doing, and they handled my car with so much care. The shine after the polish was unreal, and the interior looked cleaner than the day I bought it.

Their customer service was smooth, friendly, and professional. They kept me updated, delivered on time, and didn’t try to push any unnecessary extras.

Overall, a really satisfying experience. If you’re in Dubai and want your car to look its absolute best, this studio is totally worth it!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Ameena,

Thank you for the 5-star rating! We truly appreciate your support and are delighted that you had an excellent experience with us.

We look forward to welcoming you back to WRP soon! 🙏

reviews.text: Absolutely exceptional service! The seat stitching quality is flawless and looks factory-finished. The full car detailing was done to perfection, and the engine compartment cleaning was incredibly thorough and professionally handled. Every detail was taken care of with precision and care. Highly recommended for anyone looking for top-quality car detailing and craftsmanship.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mr.Abhi, for taking the time out to leave us with a 5 star review. This gives us great motivation to provide the best we can for our customers. We thankyou for trusting us with your vehicle.

reviews.text: Great detailing service—professional team, excellent finish, and the car looks brand new. Highly recommended!

reviews.text: Great Service, I took Car detailing Level 3. Car looks brand new. They have accommodating staff. I also love the waiting area. Will definitely go back.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, JJ! That feedback seriously made our day. We know life can be busy, especially when things run late, and we really appreciate your patience. It’s awesome to hear you enjoyed not just the detailing, but also our lounge space. Whenever you’re ready for your next wash or just want to pop by and relax, we’d love to welcome you again. 🤜🤛

reviews.text: "I highly recommend WRP Detailing! They did an amazing job on my Mercedes Benz. The car looks brand new, inside and out. The staff was professional and the service was excellent. I will definitely be back!"
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Siju,

Thank you for trusting us with your Mercedes Benz! We’re delighted to hear that your car looks brand new inside and out — that’s exactly the standard we aim for.

Your appreciation of our professionalism truly means a lot to our team. We look forward to welcoming you back soon! 🚘✨

reviews.text:
I recently took my Altima to WRP for a Full interior detailing My car was in pretty dirty, with coffee stains that I thought would never come out.
I was absolutely blown away by the results! The interior now looks and smells brand new, and I can see my reflection in the exterior paint. The team, especially Ameen, was incredibly professional and provided excellent communication throughout the entire process.
The attention to detail was meticulous; they got every nook and cranny. I highly recommend WRP to anyone looking to breathe new life into their vehicle. It was worth every penny!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mr.Azhar for taking time to leave us a review. We At WRP do take our time to deliver the best results and give you the best services we can provide. Looking forward to seeing you soon.

reviews.text: From start to finish, my experience with WRP Detailing was fantastic. They were professional, great with communication, and truly meticulous with my Land cruiser. They went above and beyond my expectations and restored my car to a showroom condition. I'm incredibly pleased with the results and recommend them to any car owner looking for top-quality detailing."
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Sabir,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback! It was a pleasure working on your Land Cruiser. We take great pride in delivering showroom-level results, and we’re thrilled that we exceeded your expectations.

Your recommendation means a lot to us ❤️ See you again soon! 🤜 🤛

reviews.text: am incredibly satisfied with the detailing service provided by 'Company WRP Detailing' for my BMW. Their team was professional from start to finish. The staff was friendly, attentive, and genuinely cared about my satisfaction. The final result exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend Company WRP Detailing to anyone looking for top-tier car detailing services in Dubai!"
